channel.title: Selected Work on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Selected Work on RaihnForge

item.title: AeroCMS — Website Redesign
item.description:
A complete redesign of the marketing site for AeroCMS (Aero Computer Management Solutions), a managed-service and hardware-as-a-service provider based in Nampa, ID with offices across five states.

The current site is WordPress + Divi: a generic hero, four service pillars buried in long copy, and a story that the company’s own strategy materials told far better than the page did. The redesign rebuilds the full site as hand-authored static HTML/CSS — homepage, about (story, values, full team, partners, offices), four service detail pages, a Good/Better/Best/Enterprise plans page with comparison table, a resource library, a news index, and a complete contact flow.

item.title: All Out Entertainment — Website Refresh
item.description:
A refresh of the website for All Out Entertainment, a full-service wedding and event entertainment company in the Pacific Northwest — DJ/MC services, day-of wedding coordination, and photo booth experiences for weddings, reunions, and celebrations.

The current site is WordPress, with duplicated sections and a structure that doesn’t lead a visiting couple cleanly from “who they are” to “book us.” The refresh focuses on a tighter information architecture, a stronger booking path, and a presentation that matches the energy of the brand.

item.title: Production Design & Visual Systems
item.description:
Selected production design and visual systems work prepared for Lead Production Designer and Visual Systems & UX roles.

Covers live broadcast overlay systems (Team Liquid × HyperX, Team Liquid Dota 2, Victorious Gaming pick-phase redesign), tournament identity and event production (Grubby × PokerStrategy, Grubby vs Flash MLG Dallas, IdrA logo system), and in-game UX from co-produced indie titles (Mecromage map screen, foundational tile system, BaseTrade TV cheermote brand system).

Online portfolio + downloadable PDF.

item.title: Riot Games — Visual Systems & UX
item.description:
Selected work prepared for Riot Games — Visual Systems & UX.

A curated selection rather than a complete archive. The pieces are chosen to show one through-line: how visual systems create emotional and experiential cohesion across every player-facing surface. Live broadcast overlay systems engineered against in-game UI, self-serve template kits that hold brand voice without a designer in the loop, motion-graphic families designed once and scaled across an ecosystem, and worldbuilding craft that gives those systems something to be cohesive around.

item.title: Central Washington University
item.description:
A six-page curated portfolio prepared for Central Washington University’s visual communication review.

The selection focuses on public-facing work that demonstrates clear, branded, audience-focused visual communication across formats and touchpoints — including KW Fitness (independent brand system), Kelvin Education (educational video and social templates), CWU Vet Center (student outreach print materials), and selected esports and community design work.

The full portfolio is available as an online page and as a downloadable PDF.
